jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Grofers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a SEO Specialist in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
